case_title: ANNE BLUETHENTHAL VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLUETHENTHAL, ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BLUETHENTHAL, ANNE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUETHENTHAL, ANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $14,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.55 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,380.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
